androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Enable AI Core Features
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Global master toggle for all AI Core automation and acceleration services.

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Experimental Accessibility Features
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Enable touch injection, screen capture, and window hierarchy dumping. WARNING: Privacy and security implications.

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: NPU Acceleration & Power Tuning
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Enable high-priority NPU scheduling and system performance modes. Supported on compatible hardware.

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Native Window Hierarchy Crawler
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Use native binder-based crawler for faster UI analysis. WARNING: Comprehensive window data exposure.
